memberdef.argsstring: (XFpga *InstancePtr, UINTPTR BitstreamImageAddr, UINTPTR KeyAddr, u32 Size, u32 Flags)
memberdef.name: XFpga_BitStream_Load

briefdescription.para: The API is used to load the bitstream file into the PL region.

detaileddescription.para: It supports AMD Vivadoâ„¢ Design Suite generated bitstream (*.bit, *.bin) and Bootgen-generated bitstream (*.bin) loading, Passing valid bitstream size(Size) information is mandatory for Vivado Design Suite generated bitstream, For Bootgen-generated bitstreams bitstream size is taken from the bitstream header.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XFpga structure.
Linear memory bitstream image base address
AES key address which is used for decryption.
Used to store size of bitstream image.

Flags are used to specify the type of bitstream file.
BIT(0) - Bitstream type
0 - Full bitstream
1 - Partial bitstream
BIT(1) - Authentication using DDR
1 - Enable
0 - Disable
BIT(2) - Authentication using OCM
1 - Enable
0 - Disable
BIT(3) - User-key Encryption
1 - Enable
0 - Disable
BIT(4) - Device-key Encryption
1 - Enable
0 - Disable

memberdef.argsstring: (XFpga *InstancePtr, UINTPTR BitstreamImageAddr, UINTPTR KeyAddr, u32 Size, u32 Flags)
memberdef.name: XFpga_ValidateImage

briefdescription.para: This function is used to validate the bitstream image.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XFpga structure
Linear memory bitstream image base address
Aes key address which is used for decryption.
Used to store size of bitstream image.

Flags are used to specify the type of bitstream file.
BIT(0) - Bitstream type
0 - Full bitstream
1 - Partial bitstream
BIT(1) - Authentication using DDR
1 - Enable
0 - Disable
BIT(2) - Authentication using OCM
1 - Enable
0 - Disable
BIT(3) - User-key Encryption
1 - Enable
0 - Disable
BIT(4) - Device-key Encryption
1 - Enable
0 - Disable

briefdescription.para: This function prepares the FPGA to receive configuration data.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XFpga.

memberdef.argsstring: (XFpga *InstancePtr, UINTPTR BitstreamImageAddr, UINTPTR KeyAddr, u32 Size, u32 Flags)
memberdef.name: XFpga_Write_Pl

briefdescription.para: This function writes the count bytes of configuration data into the PL.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XFpga structure
Linear memory bitstream image base address
Aes key address which is used for decryption.
Used to store size of bitstream image.

Flags are used to specify the type of bitstream file.
BIT(0) - Bitstream type
0 - Full bitstream
1 - Partial bitstream
BIT(1) - Authentication using DDR
1 - Enable
0 - Disable
BIT(2) - Authentication using OCM
1 - Enable
0 - Disable
BIT(3) - User-key Encryption
1 - Enable
0 - Disable
BIT(4) - Device-key Encryption
1 - Enable
0 - Disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets the FPGA to the operating state after writing.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XFpga structure

briefdescription.para: This function provides functionality to read back the PL configuration data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XFpga structure
Address which is used to store the PL readback data.
The number of FPGA configuration frames to read.

listitem.para: This API is not supported for the Versal platform.

briefdescription.para: This function provides PL specific configuration register values.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XFpga structure
Address which is used to store the PL Configuration register data.
Configuration register address as mentioned in the UG570.

listitem.para: This API is not supported for the Versal platform.

briefdescription.para: This function provides the status of the PL programming interface.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XFpga structure

simplesect.para: Status of the PL programming interface

listitem.para: This API is not supported for the Versal platform.
